---
title: "00 — Setup Python Environment"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

## Install Python dependencies

We need the `datasets` and `huggingface_hub` packages to download
American Stories from HuggingFace.

```{r install-python-deps}
library(reticulate)
use_python(PYTHON_EXE, required = TRUE)

# Install datasets and huggingface_hub if not present
py_install(c("datasets", "huggingface_hub", "pyarrow"), pip = TRUE)
```

## Install RoBERTa / Transformer dependencies

Needed for the antisemitism classification pipeline (steps 05b/05c).

```{r install-transformer-deps}
# Install torch with CUDA support + transformers ecosystem
# NOTE: torch CUDA wheels are large (~2GB). This may take a while on first run.
py_install(c("torch", "transformers", "accelerate", "scikit-learn"), pip = TRUE)
```

## Verify Python setup

```{r verify}
datasets <- import("datasets")
message("datasets version: ", datasets$`__version__`)

hf <- import("huggingface_hub")
message("huggingface_hub version: ", hf$`__version__`)

message("Python setup complete.")
```

## Verify GPU / CUDA availability

```{r verify-gpu}
py_run_string("
import torch
print(f'PyTorch version: {torch.__version__}')
print(f'CUDA available: {torch.cuda.is_available()}')
if torch.cuda.is_available():
    print(f'GPU: {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)}')
    print(f'VRAM: {torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).total_memory / 1e9:.1f} GB')
    print(f'CUDA version: {torch.version.cuda}')
else:
    print('WARNING: No CUDA GPU detected. RoBERTa training/scoring will use CPU.')
")
```
